subcodes.first_line: O refined teacher in the divine school! For some time, no letter hath been written, owing to the multitude of sorrows, pains and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان الهی مدتیست که نامه مرقوم نگشت از کثرت احزان و آلام و محن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @excellence; distinction, @the power of words; of speech
